{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Fisher Gesha's foundry
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] left the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] in [[Fisher Gesha's foundry]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
